pageContext.name: Pop Up Parade Natsu Dragneel XL
pageContext.description: Pop Up Parade XL hits the scene in a big way! From the anime series 'Fairy Tail Final Season' comes a Pop Up Parade XL anime figure of the Dragon Slayer who always looks out for his friends, Natsu Dragneel!  Pop Up Parade figures are now available in stunning 40cm XL size! Featuring stunning sculpting and paintwork that can only be enjoyed at this size! Pop Up Parade is bringing figure fans a brand new sense of excitement with the XL line. Be sure to add this gigantic and cool Natsu figure to your Fairy Tail figure collection!
